# Verification Conformance Suite

Runtime and source controls for verification contracts, trusted signature policy, artifact validation, and deterministic verdict behavior.

## Requirement Family Coverage

| Family | Focus | Requirements | Unique mapped checks |
| --- | --- | ---: | ---: |
| `V-*` | Verify route payload validation, deterministic code generation, and legacy compatibility. | `6` | `13` |
| `D-*` | Document verify upload gates, file limits, and trusted root-key resolution. | `6` | `10` |
| `T-*` | Trusted signature v4 policy, key pinning, payload-hash, and certificate-window checks. | `6` | `10` |
| `G-*` | Artifact trust gates for real Groth16 proofs and anchor coherence. | `4` | `4` |
| `O-*` | Operational controls shared across verify surfaces. | `4` | `8` |

## Full Requirement Coverage

### `V-*`

Verify route payload validation, deterministic code generation, and legacy compatibility.

<details>
<summary><code>V-001</code> <strong>pass</strong> | 2 mapped checks</summary>

| Check ID | Category | Status | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `source.verify.body_size_guard` | `source` | `pass` | Verify route enforces hard request body limits and emits payload_too_large on overflow. |
| `runtime.verify.route_payload_limit_guard` | `runtime` | `pass` | Verify route rejects payloads that exceed configured body limits. |

</details>

<details>
<summary><code>V-002</code> <strong>pass</strong> | 2 mapped checks</summary>

| Check ID | Category | Status | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `source.verify.input_regex_validation` | `source` | `pass` | Verify route validates ts/code input shape and emits deterministic field errors. |
| `runtime.verify.route_missing_fields_guard` | `runtime` | `pass` | Verify route rejects empty payloads with missing_fields. |

</details>

<details>
<summary><code>V-003</code> <strong>pass</strong> | 2 mapped checks</summary>

| Check ID | Category | Status | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `source.verify.signing_key_gate` | `source` | `pass` | Verify route fails closed when signing key is unavailable. |
| `runtime.verify.signer_key_id_deterministic` | `runtime` | `pass` | Signer key ID derivation is deterministic and fixed-width hex. |

</details>

<details>
<summary><code>V-004</code> <strong>pass</strong> | 3 mapped checks</summary>

| Check ID | Category | Status | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `source.verify.v2_payload_contract` | `source` | `pass` | Verify route computes v2 pulse-aware signatures and returns canonical /v slug/code/pulse path. |
| `runtime.verify.v2_code_deterministic` | `runtime` | `pass` | v2 code derivation is deterministic and canonicalized to 8 uppercase alphanumerics. |
| `runtime.verify.route_v2_fixture_accepts_valid` | `runtime` | `pass` | Verify route accepts a deterministic valid v2 fixture payload. |

</details>

<details>
<summary><code>V-005</code> <strong>pass</strong> | 2 mapped checks</summary>

| Check ID | Category | Status | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `source.verify.v1_legacy_fallback` | `source` | `pass` | Verify route preserves legacy v1 compatibility when pulse is absent. |
| `runtime.verify.route_v1_fixture_accepts_valid` | `runtime` | `pass` | Verify route preserves valid legacy v1 fixtures. |

</details>

<details>
<summary><code>V-006</code> <strong>pass</strong> | 2 mapped checks</summary>

| Check ID | Category | Status | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `source.verify.error_envelopes` | `source` | `pass` | Verify route publishes stable invalid_* and missing_fields error envelopes. |
| `runtime.verify.v2_code_changes_with_pulse` | `runtime` | `pass` | v2 verification code changes when pulse changes. |

</details>

### `D-*`

Document verify upload gates, file limits, and trusted root-key resolution.

<details>
<summary><code>D-001</code> <strong>pass</strong> | 1 mapped checks</summary>

| Check ID | Category | Status | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `source.document_verify.rate_limit_gate` | `source` | `pass` | Document verify route enforces IP rate limiting and exposes retry metadata. |

</details>

<details>
<summary><code>D-002</code> <strong>pass</strong> | 2 mapped checks</summary>

| Check ID | Category | Status | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `source.document_verify.multipart_and_file_gates` | `source` | `pass` | Document verify route accepts only multipart file uploads and rejects missing files. |
| `runtime.document_verify.route_unsupported_content_type` | `runtime` | `pass` | Document verify route rejects non-multipart requests. |

</details>

<details>
<summary><code>D-003</code> <strong>pass</strong> | 2 mapped checks</summary>

| Check ID | Category | Status | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `source.document_verify.file_size_guards` | `source` | `pass` | Document verify route enforces request/file size boundaries with 413 file_too_large responses. |
| `runtime.document_limits.constants_positive` | `runtime` | `pass` | Document verification limits resolve to positive deterministic values. |

</details>

<details>
<summary><code>D-004</code> <strong>pass</strong> | 2 mapped checks</summary>

| Check ID | Category | Status | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `source.document_verify.root_key_fallback` | `source` | `pass` | Document verify trusted key source prefers server-configured roots and falls back to pinned roots. |
| `runtime.document_verify.root_key_set_resolved` | `runtime` | `pass` | Trusted verification root key set resolves from server config or pinned fallback. |

</details>

<details>
<summary><code>D-005</code> <strong>pass</strong> | 2 mapped checks</summary>

| Check ID | Category | Status | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `source.document_verify.no_store_cache` | `source` | `pass` | Document verify responses are emitted with no-store caching semantics. |
| `runtime.document_verify.route_missing_file` | `runtime` | `pass` | Document verify route rejects multipart payloads without an uploaded file. |

</details>

<details>
<summary><code>D-006</code> <strong>pass</strong> | 1 mapped checks</summary>

| Check ID | Category | Status | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `source.document_limits.constants` | `source` | `pass` | Document limit constants and parsing helpers are centralized and deterministic. |

</details>

## Evidence Anchors

- [verification.conformance.json](snapshots/2026-03-28/verification.conformance.json) contains the full imported report payload.
- `requirements[]` maps standards-level requirement IDs to check IDs.
- `checks[]` contains the source and runtime assertions and their human-readable descriptions.
- `revision` identifies the current conformance revision and the number of hashed source files in scope.
- `evidence.sourceDigests[]` in the snapshot lists the referenced live source file digests.
- `history` contains the signed snapshot metadata, badge route, and history route for this suite.
